UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIMONI, ROMARITA GARIN, THELMA AS TO DEFENDANT KEHRLEIN, MICHAEL KEHRLEIN, SYLVANIE DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIMONI, ROMARITA GARIN, THELMA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KEHRLEIN, MICHAEL KEHRLEIN, SYLVANIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 170 21ST AVE $9,443.38 RENT, $225.19 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,668.57, LEASE FORFEITED, STAY TO 31-MAR-96 STIPULATED- SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
